allow: Bash(python -m pip install -q fastapi uvicorn pydantic httpx)
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8848/api/plan -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"text":"今天下午想和老婆孩子出去玩几个小时，别离家太远。孩子5岁，老婆最近在减肥"}')

Bash(python -X utf8 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('session:',d['session_id']\); print\('plans:',[p['title'] for p in d['plans']]\); print\('constraints:',[c['key'] for c in d['intent']['constraints']]\)")
